summary: Frontend-only regression + new-section testing for EFASOL landing page. All new sections (trust marquee, approach, testimonials, CTA band, scroll progress, animated stats) render correctly. Language toggle covers all new content EN<->FR. Zero console errors. Contact form still submits successfully and shows success toast. All 11 images load (no broken).
critical_code_review_comments: ScrollProgress uses a bg-gradient bar without a role/aria semantic - fine since aria-hidden is set.
Testimonials middle card has md:-translate-y-4 which may create a small overlap on some viewports (visually intentional).
CountUp uses toLocaleString which is locale-dependent; verified 10,000+ format shows US style; consider using useLanguage locale if strict FR formatting is desired (10 000+).
seed_data_creation: One test contact submission created with TEST_ prefix (name=TEST_Regression User, email=test_regression@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new sections verified with data-testid selectors. Approach steps 0-3, stats 0-3 (10,000+/50+/15+/100%), testimonials 0-2 with avatars (all naturalWidth=1024), CTA button href=#contact, scroll progress transform grows from ~0.72 (top viewport) to ~0.93 (bottom). Lang toggle text FR<->EN, translates all new sections. Zero console errors. Contact API confirmed working via toast.
